tools.description: Compile a model class locally to STEP/STL/SVG artifact files (and optional inline SVG text).

class_path.description: Dotted 'module.ClassName' path of the model to compile.

outputs.description: Artifact formats to produce. Defaults to ["step"].

params.description: Constructor kwargs as a JSON object (e.g. {"length_in_studs": 5}).

return_inline.description: Opt-in inline SVG text (svg only, under a 256 KiB cap). Defaults to false.

views.description: View names for svg output (used only when 'svg' in outputs). Defaults to ["iso_ne"].

tools.name: compile_model

tools.description: Return the live tolerance profile, curated Lego/Technic nominal constants, and documentation pointers.

profile.description: Optional tolerance-profile name (e.g. 'fdm_standard'); absent ⇒ the resolved default (honours .env PRINT_PROFILE).

tools.name: get_design_context

tools.description: List the engine's model classes (from the committed engine_api.json), with optional module-prefix / name-substring filters.

module_prefix.description: Filter to classes whose fqn or module starts with this prefix (e.g. 'vibe_cading.mechanical').

name_contains.description: Filter to classes whose short name contains this substring (case-insensitive).

tools.name: list_engine_classes

tools.description: Return the full record (constructors, doc, result accessor) for one engine class by fqn or short name.

class_key.description: The class to look up.  Matched against fqn first (exact); if match='short' or the key has no '.', falls back to the short class name.

match.description: 'exact' matches fqn (with short-name fallback when the key has no dot); 'short' forces short-name matching.

tools.name: query_engine_class
